overall.description: First-person gameplay footage navigating a post-apocalyptic urban environment with heavy fog and sepia desaturation. The player walks through rubble-strewn streets past damaged classical architecture, approaching a large domed capitol building with electrical sparks visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: ruined street with collapsed building facade and debris

agents.ego_description: walking carefully through the rubble-strewn path alongside the damaged apartment building

entered.detail: tall stone apartment building with broken windows and damaged facade running along the left side
large piles of concrete debris and collapsed structural material blocking the street
scattered smaller debris and dust covering the ground surface
fog-obscured ruined buildings visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking through a narrow rubble-filled street. A tall damaged apartment building runs along the left side while piles of concrete debris block the path ahead. Heavy fog reduces visibility to the foggy background ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with scattered debris approaching domed capitol building

events.description: electrical sparks or arcing light effects appear in the distance among the ruins
moving from narrow rubble corridor into more open plaza area with clearer view of domed building

agents.ego_description: continuing through the debris field toward the large domed capitol structure visible ahead

entered.detail: large classical government building with prominent dome visible through the fog
wrecked car or truck partially buried in rubble on the right side
bright arcing electrical effects visible in the distance among the ruins

segments.scene_description: The player emerges into a more open plaza area while approaching the large domed capitol building. Electrical sparks flicker in the distant fog. The apartment building recedes to the left background as the camera moves forward through the scattered debris.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza directly in front of domed capitol building

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the full dome and upper architecture of the capitol building against the foggy sky
camera tilts back down to street level, focusing on the building facade and ground debris

agents.ego_description: stopping to look up at the architectural details of the domed building before returning gaze to street level

entered.detail: the ornate dome and cupola of the capitol building visible against the gray sky when looking upward

segments.scene_description: Approaching the capitol building, the camera tilts up to reveal the full dome architecture against the foggy sky, then tilts back down to show the building's stone facade and the debris-strewn plaza at its base. The surrounding ruins and apartment building exit the frame as the focus centers on the domed structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic, rubble-filled alleyway into a vast, desolate plaza dominated by a monumental capitol building. It begins by navigating a narrow street flanked by a damaged apartment building, where piles of concrete debris and heavy fog obscure the distant ruins. As the camera pushes forward, the narrow corridor opens into a wide plaza, causing the apartment building to recede into the background while electrical sparks begin to flicker in the distance. The scene then shifts focus entirely toward the capitol building, with the camera tilting upward to reveal the massive dome against a foggy sky before tilting back down to the stone facade. Finally, the surrounding ruins exit the frame as the movement centers on the imposing architecture and the debris-strewn ground at its base.
